title: Pourthiaea parviflora
taxonomy: Pourthiaea parviflora is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. It is a small tree or shrub native to Asia. The classification of Pourthiaea parviflora is as follows: kingdom - Plantae, clade - Angiosperms, clade - Magnoliids, class - Magnoliopsida, order - Magnoliales, family - Annonaceae, genus - Pourthiaea, species - P. parviflora. This classification highlights its position within the plant kingdom and its relationships with other plant species. By understanding its classification, we can better comprehend the evolutionary history and characteristics of Pourthiaea parviflora.
